notes: Separated About & Privacy information from the public homepage so the homepage stays more user-facing.

Renamed and reorganised Pathmark Online to follow the desktop sidebar order: Home, Review Queue, Areas, Routines, Goals and Projects, Tasklist, Google Calendar Export, Google Tasks Export, Archive and Settings.
Removed standalone ad hoc Calendar Block and Task Prompt creation from the online interface so online functionality does not exceed the desktop model.
Added edit and archive flows for online Areas, goals, routines, action blocks and routine activities using the user-owned Google Sheet.
Split online exports into desktop-style Google Calendar Export and Google Tasks Export pages.
